'''''Prominence''''' was a [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]].

It was part of a mission dispatched to [[Asmeru/Legends|Asmeru]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] to apprehend the leaders of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]]. ''Prominence'' and its sister ship, the [[Ecliptic (Consular-class)|''Ecliptic'']], came under attack by Nebula Front forces, with the ''Prominence'' crashing onto the planet, where it was destroyed. All twelve crewmembers survived, however, only to be captured by the Front.

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
